name: linear-cli
description: Teach Codex how to operate Linear through the local schpet/linear-cli installation across issues, planning, documents, teams, and workspace administration.

interface.shortDescription: Operate Linear through the local CLI
interface.longDescription: Use the locally installed linear CLI for issue management, planning workflows, documents, labels, teams, workspace routing, and raw GraphQL fallback with explicit safety and verification rules.
defaultPrompt: Use the local linear CLI to inspect workspaces, manage issues, and drive planning workflows safely
